post_copy_actions: Update package.json repository to atomicstrata/atomicmemory with directory plugins/codex.
Update package.json homepage and bugs URLs to the monorepo issue tracker.
Keep the package unpublished until host marketplace manifest format is validated.
Keep registry_artifact null until the coming-soon status is removed.
Verify lock-step plugin version still matches sibling plugins after monorepo workspace install.
notes: Package remains unpublished. Source still ships into the public monorepo because the directory is public-safe and host validators need it for offline marketplace work. marketplace.example.json must not contain real submission identifiers.
